Chorus:
[tab]            [ch]Csus[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
This is the story of a girl[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Asus[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Who cried a river and drowned the whole world[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Csus[/ch]
While she looks so sad in photographs[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]ASus[/ch]
I absolutely love her[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Csus[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Csus[/ch]
When she smiles[/tab]

Verse:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]Csus[/ch]
How many days in the year[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
She woke up with hope but she only found tears[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]Csus[/ch]
And I can be so incincere[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Making her promises never for real[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]Csus[/ch]
As long as she stands there waiting[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Wearing the holes in the soles of her shoes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]Csus[/ch]
How many days disappear[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
When you look in the mirror so how do you choose[/tab]

Bridge:
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                                  [ch]F#[/ch]
Your clothes never wear as well the next day[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Asus[/ch]
Your hair never falls in quite the same way[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]F#[/ch]             [ch]Asus[/ch]
But you never seem to run out of things to say[/tab]

Chorus

Verse 2:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]Csus[/ch]
How many lovers would stay[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Just to put up with this every day and all day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]Csus[/ch]
How did we wind up this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
Watching our mouths for the words that we say[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]Csus[/ch]
As long as we stand here waiting[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
Wearing the clothes of the souls that we choose[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]Csus[/ch]
How do we get there today[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
When we're walking too far for the price of our shoes[/tab]

Bridge

Chorus
